IVFclinic in Greece About IVF Clinic, Institute of Life, in Athens. An experienced and qualified team of doctors are waiting for you at the IVFclinic in a state-of-the-art lab, to offer you guidance right from the first appointment. We are standing by you to answer all your questions and help you choose the right treatment together.Technical know-how, experience, speed and, above all, reliability are what make the IVFclinic the most comprehensive unit for infertility issues of both sexes. 01 - Our Treatments 02 - Our Clinic 03 - All you need to know / Download pdf Egg freezing Egg Donation In Vitro Fertilization (IVF) Treatments We are proud to show you all future ivf treatments. IVFclinic in Greece offers top quality medical services with high safety standards. Continuous collaboration with all departments and doctors of various specialties contributes to the treatment of the most difficult medical incidents. Read more Latest News For more information, just follow us. At IVFclinic in Greece, we have been there to make your dream come true for over 20 years. Our recognized infertility specialists, closely with you, develop a personalized fertility treatment plan. Our city of Athens, in Greece, is a leading destination for tourists around the world and our fertility center offers the chance to be a destination to happiness!!! Egg donation treatment Egg donation is a fertility treatment consisting in-vitro donation of oocytes (eggs) from an anonymous donor. It is a safe, reliable fertility treatment with high rates of success. Learn More In vitro fertilization (IVF) in Greece One of the best-known fertility treatments is in vitro fertilisation, also known as IVF, a technique whereby an egg is extracted from the uterus and then, fertilised in the laboratory (in vitro) with semen from the partner or donor. Learn More Egg Freezing in Greece Continuous advances in IVF often result in a high number of good quality embryos in each treatment cycle. Of these the embryologist will select the "best" to be transferred to the woman's body.
